reviewer_label: Codex fresh no-context RR-AUTH-04 final review

recommended_path: Proceed with the recorded closure sequence: capture this final review, complete the planned Claude comparison attempt record, synchronize the authoritative TODO/package/plan artifacts, rerun the remaining deterministic guards, and close RR-AUTH-04 if those governance steps remain clean.
